title: Postgraduate Programs
content: Postgraduate Programs MSc a) Biotechnology b) Microbiology MBA Master of Business Administration (MBA) MTech a) Biotechnology b) Civil Engineering Civil Engineering with a specialization in Construction Management Civil Engineering with a specialization in Environmental Engineering Civil Engineering with a specialization in Structural Engineering c) Computer Science & Engineering Computer Science & Engineering (General) Computer Science & Engineering with a specialization in Data Science Computer Science & Engineering with a specialization in Information Security d) Electronics & Communication Engineering Electronics & Communication Engineering (General) Electronics & Communication Engineering with a specialization in Internet of Things
